docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,625.02 FILED BY CRAVENS, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT UDR. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AARON CRAVENS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UDR. INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ELLINGTON DIAS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-27-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UDR. INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CRAVENS, AARON UDR. INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAVENS, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT UDR. INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAVENS, AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UDR. INC. $1,810.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
